Announcements

Announcements

The ALAT English Preparatory Academic Placement Exam

21
						November

2025

Dear students,

The English Preparatory Academic Placement Exam will be held online via the O

’

Learn platform on Thursday, November 27. You are required to complete the necessary technical preparations on the O

’

Learn platform before the exam. Detailed information regarding platform access will be shared on O

’

Learn prior to the exam. Students who wish to apply for the exam can simply send their request to

aleyna.acikalin@okan.edu.tr

.

Those who score 70 or above in this exam will be eligible to take the face-to-face OPAE Proficiency Exam on Frıday

We wish you success.
